#comment: The following are CMOR internal settings and should not be edited by the user
_history_template: %s; Daily precipitation generated by summing 24 hourly GSMaP precipitation values for each UTC day. Daily values are provided only when all 24 hourly inputs are available for a grid cell; otherwise the daily value is set to missing. CMOR rewrote data to be consistent with <activity_id> and <Conventions> standards
license: Data in this file is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).
references: Japan Aerospace Exploration Agency. 1998. GSMaP(hourly). https://eolp.jaxa.jp/GSMaP_Hourly.html
title: GSMaP MVK-Gauge daily (summed from hourly)
variant_info: obs4MIPs-compliant product prepared by NASA-GISS. Daily precipitation is derived from the GSMaP hourly product by summing the 24 hourly precipitation values within each UTC day. A daily value is reported only when all 24 hourly values are present for a grid cell; if one or more hourly values are missing, the corresponding daily value is set to missing.
